text:
EXPLANATION: The paper with this exact title was published in Nature Communications in 2025, but the cited author list is significantly longer than the actual author list found in academic databases, which indicates a fabrication of the author metadata.

LINK: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-025-56989-2
FOUND_TITLE: Benchmarking large language models for biomedical natural language processing applications and recommendations
FOUND_AUTHORS: NONE
FOUND_YEAR: NONE
VERDICT: LIKELY
